rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM LUCAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 7, 2016 for a response to the examiner's notes emailed to Counsel on 10/26/16 at 3:31 p.m. an unfiled original signature declaration was dropped off for the examiner, but it was signed and verified by the attorney. the exception that allows an attorney to sign does not apply when the client is a fiduciary appointed in the proceeding (CRC 7.103(c)). in addition, the caption of the order was not corrected to begin with Order for Final Distribution as required.
